    NRCA NOW ENROLLING

    PREK-12th GRADE

    LEARN MORE
    Welcome to NRCA

    North Raleigh Christian Academy has partnered with families in central North Carolina since 1996 to provide excellence in academics, fine arts, and athletics from a biblical worldview. In a nurturing environment, we equip our students to impact their society for Christ, starting in the Triangle area and extending globally. Take a moment to learn more about NRCA.  

    ADMISSIONS

    PreK - 12th Grade

    Partnering with Families in Christ-Centered Education

    If you would like to receive additional information about NRCA, please click below. Tuition assistance is available and opportunity scholarships are accepted.

    Latest News

    Senior Capstone Brings Softball Fun to Younger Girls

    “It was an elementary and middle school all-levels clinic that was supposed to encourage young athletes to come try out softball and see how fun it was,” Harrison said. The clinic was open to NRCA girls in second through eighth grade.

    NRCA’s Senior Parade Unites the Campus in Celebration

    Sunshine and smiles filled the Senior Parade route as the Class of 2026 circled the campus in celebration of their final month of high school and all the years that came before. From PreK through the junior class, NRCA students and teachers, along with staff and parents, lined the sidewalk, waving and cheering.

    PreACT Rising Stars Program Debut

    This year, NRCA had the privilege of celebrating an exciting new national recognition initiative from ACT called the PreACT Rising Stars Program.

    He is risen! — He is risen indeed!

    As we enter into the Easter season, this familiar call and response will likely be something each of us hear as we step into spaces alongside believers. The response is almost instinctual for many of us as we recognize that the natural flow of our calendar has brought us back to this time of year – where we remember the work that Jesus accomplished on the cross and celebrate together the resurrection of our Savior.

    Built From the Ground Up: NRCA Seniors Make History on National Stage

    First is the word of the year for NRCA seniors Eddie Kubiak and Tully Martinez. The duo was part of the first-ever countywide student chapter of the National Association of Home Builders (NAHB), the first countywide student chapter to win the NAHB Student Competition, and the first student team ever to win the competition in their first year.

    NRCA Seniors Hit the Slopes at Snowshoe

    On Sunday, March 1, NRCA seniors departed for the snowy elevations of Snowshoe Mountain Resort in West Virginia. The group of around 20 seniors gathered their coats and boots to hit the slopes.

      NORTH RALEIGH CHRISTIAN ACADEMY

      7300 Perry Creek Rd Raleigh, NC 27616

      School: (919) 573-7900

      Email: info@nrcaknights.com

      Office Hours: 7:15 am until 4:00 pm

      Non-Discriminatory Policy

      North Raleigh Christian Academy admits students of any race, color, national or ethnic origin to all the rights, privileges, programs and activities generally accorded or made available to students at the school. It does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, national or ethnic origin in administration of its education, employment, admission policies, tuition assistance, athletic and other school-administered programs.
